modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble starting a 3-way call on Cisco VOIP 8851

full_description_text: I was trying to make a 3-way call on the Cisco VOIP 8851. It just wouldn't work like I thought it should. I don't know what I'm doing wrong, but I need help with this.
short_description: Trouble starting a 3-way call on Cisco VOIP 8851
description: I was trying to make a 3-way call on the Cisco VOIP 8851. It just wouldn't work like I thought it should. I don't know what I'm doing wrong, but I need help with this.
